name: vendor-selection-demo-source-pack
purpose: Editable business and data inputs for the governed vendor-selection demo.

documents.purpose: Business problem, upstream assumptions, scope, and success criteria.
Hard gates, objective weights, and tuning guidance.
Post-decision procurement actions and open team questions.

data.purpose: Competition-derived candidate set for the breakout optimization.
Role-level competition evidence for the provider-mix recommendation.
Compact router/provider-mix scenario retained for alternate runs.
